name: Chair-To-There
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (not directly verified via public search)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Listed at 63 High St, Danvers MA 01923; phone (978) 777-7615. Operates as public transportation/school bus/handicapped & elderly/airport transport per business directory listing. No FMCSA SAFER hits for 'Chair To There', 'Chair-To-There', or 'CHAIRTOTHERE'. No clear MA Secretary of State entity confirmed via web search; likely registered as DBA / sole proprietorship or small LLC under a different legal name. Bizapedia page returned HTTP 410 (gone).

name: Trans Assist
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State Business Search (not directly verified via public search; access blocked)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate or DBA). Input HQ is PO Box 881, Perrysburg, OH 43552. Closest known operator is 'Transport Assistance, Inc.' (trans-assist.com, USDOT 2637076) BUT that entity is headquartered at 5481 State Rd, Parma OH 44134 (Greater Cleveland) — NOT Perrysburg — and serves DODD/CCBDD. Different city/region, so likely a separate intrastate NEMT or school transport operator under same/similar name in NW Ohio (Toledo area). No FMCSA SAFER match for 'Trans Assist' in Perrysburg. Trans Tech Logistics (Perrysburg, USDOT 619079) is a freight trucking firm, not a passenger/NEMT operator and is unrelated.

name: M & K Wheelchair Transport
registry_source: BBB business profile (proxy for CA Secretary of State registration); legal name 'M And K Wheelchair Transport LLC'
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate; California NEMT operators frequently register only with CA HP/PUC/CHP and not FMCSA). Legal name per BBB: 'M And K Wheelchair Transport LLC'. BBB file opened 9/10/2015 (proxy for inc_date ~2015). Owner: Edna Nacion-Anderson. BBB-listed address 2553 Anacapa Dr, Costa Mesa, CA 92626 (differs slightly from input 2506 Christopher Ln). Phone (714) 612-6303. Provides non-emergent medical wheelchair transport. No FMCSA SAFER match for 'M & K WHEELCHAIR' or 'M AND K WHEELCHAIR'.

name: Premium Limousine
registry_source: MN Secretary of State Business & Lien System (not directly verified via public search)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Listed at 40 W Riverside Rd, Esko, MN 55733 in Dun & Bradstreet business directory. Address corresponds to a residential property (per Zillow/Redfin), consistent with very small owner-operator limo / livery business. FMCSA SAFER 'PREMIUM LIMOUSINE' search returned one match in SAINT LOUIS, MO (USDOT 2563268) which is NOT this MN operator. 'PREMIUM LIMO' SAFER search returned only San Bruno, CA (USDOT 3987142). No MN-state SAFER hit. Per MnDOT/DPS, MN intrastate limousine operators must hold a USDOT number to operate, so this entity may be unregistered or has ceased operations. No Bizapedia/OpenCorporates entity confirmed.
